documentation.value:
Prints data to the console with a newline.
```coffeescript
console.log 'Hello World'
console.log 'Count:', 42
console.log {name: 'Alice', age: 30}
```
Primary value to log.
Additional values to log, space-separated.

Displays a browser alert dialog with the specified message.
```coffeescript
alert 'Warning!'
alert "You have #{count} items"
```
The message string to display in the alert dialog.

Calls a function after a specified delay in milliseconds.
```coffeescript
setTimeout (->
  console.log 'Delayed'
), 1000

tid = setTimeout doWork, 500
```
The function to execute after the delay.
Time in milliseconds before execution.
Optional arguments passed to the callback.

Repeatedly calls a function at a fixed time interval.
```coffeescript
setInterval (->
  console.log 'tick'
), 1000
```
The function to execute at each interval.
Time in milliseconds between each execution.
Optional arguments passed to the callback.

Converts a JavaScript value to a JSON string.
```coffeescript
str = JSON.stringify {name: 'Alice', age: 30}
formatted = JSON.stringify obj, null, 2
```
The value to convert to JSON.
Optional function or array to filter/transform values.
Optional indentation (number of spaces or string).

Parses a JSON string and returns the resulting value.
```coffeescript
obj = JSON.parse '{"name":"Alice"}'
data = JSON.parse text, (key, val) -> val
```
The JSON string to parse.
Optional function to transform parsed values.

Returns the largest of zero or more numbers.
```coffeescript
Math.max 1, 5, 3       # 5
Math.max ...myArray
```
Numbers to compare. Returns `-Infinity` if no arguments.

Returns the smallest of zero or more numbers.
```coffeescript
Math.min 1, 5, 3       # 1
Math.min ...myArray
```
Numbers to compare. Returns `Infinity` if no arguments.

Returns the value of `x` rounded to the nearest integer.
```coffeescript
Math.round 4.7   # 5
Math.round 4.4   # 4
Math.round -4.5  # -4
```
A number to round.

Determines whether the passed value is an Array.
```coffeescript
Array.isArray [1, 2, 3]   # true
Array.isArray 'hello'     # false
Array.isArray arguments   # false
```
The value to check.
